raw_text:
WARNING [TC-K-005] interface.f90:7 <-> header.h:2  param[2] 'tol'
  OPTIONAL_NULL: Fortran OPTIONAL argument 'tol' passes NULL when absent
  (Fortran 2018 §18.10.2). C prototype 'double *tol' with no annotation.
  If C code dereferences 'tol' without checking for NULL, segfault occurs
  when caller omits 'tol'.

WARNING [TC-K-005] interface.f90:8 <-> header.h:2  param[3] 'max_iter'
  OPTIONAL_NULL: Same for 'max_iter'.

NOTE: C side must guard: if (tol) { ... } before every dereference.
      Document that NULL means "use default". This is non-standard Flang
      extension — OPTIONAL in BIND(C) is implementation-defined.
